name: Chief of Staff
description: Chief of Staff — local scheduling/briefing UI + runner that cascades across local (Ollama) and cloud (Groq/Anthropic/OpenAI) models. Extracted from the agent-builder workbench into its own app.

optional.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
optional.description: Base URL for the local Ollama server used for the local model-cascade lane and model listing.

optional.name: OLLAMA_MODEL
optional.description: Override the default local Ollama model used by the run-chief-of-staff.mjs CLI script. No default — cascade picks a per-node default when unset.

optional.name: GROQ_API_KEY
optional.description: Cloud lane 1 (Groq, primary cloud provider) for the run cascade. Absent = cloud lane skipped, local Ollama only.

optional.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
optional.description: Cloud lane 2 (Anthropic) for the run cascade. Absent = lane disabled.

optional.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
optional.description: Cloud lane 3 (OpenAI) for the run cascade. Absent = lane disabled.

optional.name: COS_ALLOW_CLOUD
optional.description: Gate for allowing cloud-lane fallback during a run (same semantics as the --allow-cloud CLI flag). No default — cloud is off unless set.

optional.name: COS_MAX_CLOUD_TOKENS
optional.description: Caps cloud-lane token usage per run (same semantics as the --max-cloud-tokens CLI flag). No default cap unless set.

optional.name: AGENT_BUILDER_LLM_TIMEOUT_MS
optional.description: Per-model-call timeout in milliseconds, used by the run-chief-of-staff.mjs CLI script.

network: http://localhost:11434 (Ollama: local model cascade + model listing)
